offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient vendor contract management causes missed discounts. We monitor and optimize vendor contracts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inefficient vendor contract management leading to missed discounts and unfavorable terms.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage on Indie Hackers about vendor management
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Share insights in Amazon seller forums and groups
try_it: Let users try contract monitoring alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the solution
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing vendor data
